name: bymax-bootstrap
description: Scaffold new projects with strict TypeScript, ESLint flat-config (security + import-order + suppression bans), Prettier, .vscode (format-on-save), Husky + commitlint + lint-staged, and CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / README.md templates. Detects the stack (Next.js, Expo/RN, Vite+React, Node) and uses the right ESLint preset. Includes /upgrade-standards for non-destructive upgrades on existing projects.
